title: The U.S. has launched a review of copper under Section 232
bodyHtml:
U.S. President Trump has issued an Executive Order  directing the US Department of Commerce to initiate an investigation under Section 232 regarding copper imports.

The investigation will be conducted by the Department of Commerce and will cover the following product groups:

(i)    raw mined copper

(ii)   copper concentrates

(iii)  refined copper

(iv)   copper alloys

(v)    scrap copper; and

(vi)   derivative products.

Within 270 days, the U.S. Secretary of Commerce will submit a report to the President on the matter. Based on the report's findings, an additional tariff may be imposed on the specified products, similar to the measures applied to steel and aluminum.

Click here for the relevant Executive Order.
